project: DEATH GATE CYCLE - Games-VR Interface Wireframes

designPhilosophy.guidingPrinciple: Match-3 foundation validates gesture UI for all Death Gate realms
designPhilosophy.futureExpansionPath: Four realms where gravity flips in each realm, Match-3 mechanics adapt

section1_hudLayout2DPlane.description: Desktop → Mobile adaptation with consistent spatial positioning

content: Dynamic glow radius around valid drop targets

behavior.approaching: Expand ring on drag start (scale: 1→1.5 over 300ms)
Expand outward ring on drag start
behavior.readyToCatch: Bright glow + directional arrow toward drop slot

features.scoreHUDPosition: Right side panel (not corner, more space)
features.catchZoneBehavior: Expandable ring with visual arrow indicators

webXRBrowserFallbackMode.description: Portrait mode interface for phone-only/WebXR browser testing

layoutStructure.catchZoneBehavior: Bottom edge glow zone with touch feedback
layoutStructure.controlsPosition: Bottom 40% (large touch targets for browser testing)

section2_manipulationMappingMouseTouch.description: Consistent gesture system across mouse, touch, and VR controllers

gestureUnificationTable: | Action              | Mouse           | Touch (Mobile)   | VR Controller        | Accessibility Alternative     |

1_tileDragAndDrop.description: Physically grounded tile pickup and placement (core Match-3 mechanic)

mouseVariant.snapThreshold: 5px radius → Magnetic pull to grid slot
mouseVariant.release: L-click drops at position or catch zone

touchVariant.visualFeedback: Tile lifts slightly + glow color shift to grab state
touchVariant.hapticFeedback: Light pulse (30ms, magnitude: 0.2) on grab confirm

vrControllerVariant.grab: Pinch gesture on tile edge → Instant visual pickup
vrControllerVariant.visualFeedback: Raycast line from tile center to catch zone endpoint (#ff9100 orange)
vrControllerVariant.hapticFeedback: Medium pulse (50ms, magnitude: 0.4) on snap success

accessibilityAlternative.keyboardNavigation: Arrow keys move tile; Space drops at position

2_matchAndClear.description: Visual confirmation when 3+ tiles match for clearing

visual.particleEffect: Explosion burst expands over 200ms → Debris particles scatter

3_specialTileActivation.description: Line clear, explosion, and bomb tile mechanics

lineClearGesture.mouse: Right-click 4 tiles in row/column → Line particles burst outward
lineClearGesture.touch: Long-press (1200ms) on matched line → Rising chime + expansion effect
lineClearGesture.vr: Double-tap two endpoint tiles → Wave pattern expands

explosionGesture.mouse: Middle-click 5 tiles in T/L shape → Radial explosion clearing adjacent
explosionGesture.touch: Tap-hold (1500ms) on grouped tiles → Crackling burst + debris scatter
explosionGesture.vr: Pinch-expand gesture on pattern → Heavy vibration sequence (3x pulses)

bombTileGesture.mouse: Click bomb icon → 3×3 area clears with delayed boom effect
bombTileGesture.touch: Tap bomb symbol → Loud boom sound + sustained vibration (200ms)
bombTileGesture.vr: Pull trigger button on bomb tile → Explosion particles radial burst

4_pauseAndMenuAccess.description: Non-intrusive pause and settings menu activation

mouseVariant.trigger: Press ESC key + hold 500ms dwell time
mouseVariant.alternative: Click dedicated pause button in top-right corner

touchVariant.gestureDetail: Wave hand above shoulder ≥2m OR head shake (motor impairment)
touchVariant.palmOrientation: Must face camera for wave gesture
touchVariant.visualFeedback: Pause menu overlay fades in over entire screen with semi-transparent backdrop

vrControllerVariant.gestureDetail: Open hand gesture + 500ms dwell time OR controller pause button

5_realmSwitchExpansion.description: Future expansion gesture for toggling between Death Gate realms
5_realmSwitchExpansion.mouseVariant: Click realm switch button in settings panel
5_realmSwitchExpansion.touchVariant: Tap + hold realm indicator (60×60px) → Cycle through available realms
5_realmSwitchExpansion.vrControllerVariant: Wave hand upward → Toggle normal/inverted Y gravity mode
5_realmSwitchExpansion.accessibilityAlternative: Voice command: 'Switch to Pryan realm' / 'Enable light vision'

crossPlatformGestureConsistencyRules.1_velocityPreservation: Drag motion maintains velocity vector + gravity influence across all platforms
crossPlatformGestureConsistencyRules.2_snapThresholdStandardization: 0.5m radius on touch/VB, 5px on desktop mouse (equivalent physical distance)
crossPlatformGestureConsistencyRules.3_visualFeedbackParity: All interactions must show visual state change regardless of platform
crossPlatformGestureConsistencyRules.4_hapticFallbacks: Haptics enhance but don't enable — all mechanics must work without them

section3_progressionUI.description: Level select, difficulty scaling, and achievement tracking interfaces

mobileLayout.viewType: Horizontal scroll list with locked/unlocked indicators
mobileLayout.positioning: Vertical stack, 10 levels visible per screen

desktopLayout.viewType: Grid layout with expanded thumbnail previews

realmBadgeIntegration.description: Visual indicator showing which realm level belongs to (future expansion)
realmBadgeIntegration.positioning: Top-left corner of level card, 48×48px badge

mobileLayout.positioning: Below level select, 44px minimum touch target

accessibilityFeatures.keyboardNavigation: Arrow keys adjust difficulty, Enter confirms selection

mobileLayout.viewType: Circular icon badges with unlock animation

unlockedAchievements.visualState: Gold border + glow pulse on tap/tap-tap effect

desktopLayout.viewType: Achievement list with expandable details per entry
desktopLayout.progressIndicator: Ring progress bar showing completion percentage

colorBlindAccessibilityFeatures.description: All critical information must be perceivable without relying on color alone
implementationDetails: Distinct tile textures + patterns (not just colors)
Tested against Deuteranopia, Protanopia, Tritanopia simulations
High contrast mode adds 30% luminance difference to all elements

alternatives.description: Tile moves to cursor location without manual drag
Grid navigation via arrow keys (desktop mode)

colorPaletteChanges.specialTiles: All colors shift to high-contrast variants

highContrastModeSettings.positioning: Settings toggle in top-right corner, 60×60px touch target

voiceCommandSupport.activationMethod: Hold 'voice key' button (desktop) or wave hand twice (mobile)

ariaImplementation: <div role='grid' aria-label='Match-3 game grid, 64 points possible'>

focusOrder.logicalFlow: Grid first → Score HUD → Controls → Settings

section5_deliveryAndHandoff.figmaMockupsStatus: Pending creation (next step after Zifnab review)

haploWebImplementation.assetDelivery: Design tokens + component libraries from Arianus-Sky/
haploWebImplementation.specDocumentation: Wireframe specs shared with Haplo team

paithanMobileImplementation.assetDelivery: Platform-specific specs (iOS HIG / Android Material Design)
paithanMobileImplementation.specDocumentation: Gesture mapping matrix + mobile optimization notes

day1: Figma design mockups (mobile + desktop views) - Pending
Gesture mapping matrix documentation - In progress
day2: Mobile touch shell integration with raycast collision (Paithan)
day3: First integration demo with core Match-3 mechanics
User testing session (5 participants, 15 min each)
